race.comment: DURHAM LEGACY (1) is a speedy type having his first run for Liam Howley. Hasn't raced since finishing ninth at Wagga six months ago. He did start favourite there, which was a much tougher race than this. ZAMORA (4) speared to the lead from a wide alley before fading right out of it over 1109m at Echuca last time. Blinkers come off and only needs to rediscover form of the two runs prior to be a key player. MOAKSUN (2) is Asfoora's half-brother who has been racing consistently, including a last-start 3rd in 0-62 grade, which is good enough form for this. FORTYFOUR MAGNUM (10) hasn't been able to break through for an extended period, but the last-start 10th was preceded by a good second placing and the gun draw gives her the chance to rediscover that form. REDEMPTION TIME (11) was below her best last time when 6 lengths from the winner in fifth over 1100m at Stawell, but form here over this distance is very good with a win and three minor placings from four starts.
